variable_identity.standardized_name_en: ICU length of stay in days

immutable_core.semantic_intent: ICU length of stay duration summary
immutable_core.semantic_definition: A one-row-per-ICU-stay or ICU-semantic stay-equivalent duration summary retaining ICU length of stay in days under an explicit ICU admission anchor and full-stay interval contract, rather than a raw event stream, hospital stay duration, or first-day partial summary.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per anchor-qualified summary target
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_icu_los_days must preserve full ICU-stay duration meaning under the ICU admission anchor and must not silently widen to hospital length of stay or non-ICU-only scope.

summary_contract.window_start_rule: start at ICU admission or ICU-semantic stay entry
summary_contract.window_end_rule: end at ICU discharge or ICU-semantic stay end
summary_contract.qualifying_row_rule: one retained duration summary per ICU stay or ICU-semantic stay-equivalent row inside the approved same-name scope

canonical_representation.range_role_note: These ranges are governance-time duration bounds for the current approved LOS assets, not a claim that every future ICU cohort or raw local field in every database must stay inside the plausible band.

external_alignment.alignment_policy: Use external terminologies as semantic anchors when reliable, but do not make them the backbone of the standard-variable system.
external_alignment.note: std_icu_los_days is a derived interval-duration summary whose current cross-database identity is governed primarily by anchor, grain, and boundary rules rather than one exact external code.

new_variable_trigger_examples: changing std_icu_los_days from ICU stay duration to hospital length of stay
changing std_icu_los_days from full ICU-stay duration to first-day ICU duration or another partial-window summary
version_bump_trigger_examples: adding a new reviewed database mapping while preserving the same ICU-stay duration meaning
tightening the duration range guidance or locking a later external semantic anchor without changing the interval meaning

allowed_database_specific_variation: raw interval fields used to define start and end boundaries
database-specific local structural keys and stay-equivalent identifiers
presence or absence of audit-only reported duration fields alongside the retained primary duration
disallowed_same_name_variation: publishing hospital length of stay as std_icu_los_days
publishing MC-only Amsterdam admissions or other non-ICU-only scope as std_icu_los_days without explicit contract revision

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_icu_los_days outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec. Execute-mode runtime evidence should record both spec hashes and formal output-file signatures.
execution_governance.future_non_bypassable_rule: Formal std_icu_los_days outputs should be generated only through the governed execution.py path reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.
